_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79.6% August 2024 bottom analog and stablecoin/gold accumulation suggest eventual upward resolution toward Denial, but with zero directional breakers in 39 windows and funding flat at 0.0003%, HOLD is the only statistically honest call until the coil actually breaks.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both lean bullish on the analog but disagree on conviction (0.45 vs 0.796) and the analyst explicitly defaults to HOLD while the narrative's powder-keg framing implies latent bullishness without committing to a directional call
